task_completion.description: Verify the 'net-monitor' container is successfully running.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing 'docker ps' with 'net-monitor' in the 'Up' state, or successful execution of 'docker-compose up -d' without errors.

task_completion.description: Verify the container is configured to run as the non-root user 'monitor' or UID 1000.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the docker-compose.yml file with 'user: "1000"' or 'user: "monitor"' under the net-monitor service, or 'docker inspect' output showing the User field set to 1000/monitor.

task_completion.description: Verify all default capabilities are dropped.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The docker-compose.yml file showing 'cap_drop:' followed by '- ALL', or a docker run command including '--cap-drop=ALL'.

task_completion.description: Verify the NET_BIND_SERVICE capability is added to allow binding to port 80.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The docker-compose.yml file showing 'cap_add:' followed by '- NET_BIND_SERVICE', or a docker run command including '--cap-add=NET_BIND_SERVICE'.

task_completion.description: Verify the NET_RAW capability is added to allow sending ICMP ping packets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The docker-compose.yml file showing 'cap_add:' followed by '- NET_RAW', or a docker run command including '--cap-add=NET_RAW'.

task_completion.description: Verify the service responds correctly to the health check endpoint.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing the successful execution of 'curl http://localhost:80' returning a valid HTTP response or expected service output.

task_completion.description: Verify the service responds correctly to the ping endpoint.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing the successful execution of 'curl http://localhost:80/ping?target=127.0.0.1' returning ping statistics or a success message.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually executed the docker and curl commands in a real terminal environment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Standard terminal prompts, command execution delays, and authentic system output rather than just echoing text or spoofing command results.

integrity.description: Verify the agent genuinely modified the configuration files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Use of a text editor (like nano, vim) or valid shell commands (like sed, echo) to modify the docker-compose.yml file in the ~/projects/net-monitor/ directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the least privilege requirement by using 'privileged: true' or running as root.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of 'privileged: true' in the docker-compose.yml file and absence of root user execution in the final container configuration.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires modifying the 'net-monitor' service in '/home/ga/projects/net-monitor/docker-compose.yml'. The container must run as user 'monitor' or UID '1000'. It must drop all capabilities ('cap_drop: - ALL') and add exactly two capabilities: 'NET_BIND_SERVICE' (to bind port 80) and 'NET_RAW' (to send ICMP packets). The service must be running and respond to 'curl http://localhost:80' and 'curl http://localhost:80/ping?target=127.0.0.1'. The pass threshold is 70/100, with non-root execution being a critical requirement.
